$comment: DC2 raptor (E00-family) variant/tier table, decoded from Dino2.exe (RAPTOR-TIER-RE.md). variant = low nibble of [actor+0x10C]; hp = hpBase + rand(0..31), x2 hard / /2 easy ([G+0x108E]); tex ids are PSX-order file ids (PC = same filename). Valid variants 0-7 (stock static spawns use 7; 8+ read garbage records) - the randomizer must clamp to these. aiNibbles = raw bytes 1-2 of the 5-byte record at 0x7031E8 (semantics unverified). default_weight: 0-15 pool weight (v5 super raptor rare by default).

variants.notes: super/'blue' raptor; forced naturally by combo latch [G+0x138A]; rare in pool by default
the common STOCK static-spawn variant (16/23 op-0x1a raptor spawns use literal 7)

waveIndexFormula: idx = min(desc[+4] + 3*word[G+0x1388], 9); variant = pair[idx][rand()&1]; latch word[G+0x138A]!=0 forces variant 5
